characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Big Brother Instinct: All three of them have several moments of looking out for each other. Starley is the most protective, threatening those who hurt her brothers, Finley looks out for his siblings due to his smarts, and even Chuck can be concerned for his siblings or even self sacrificing. Big Little Brother: Chuck, the third to hatch is the tallest while Finley, who hatched first is the smallest. True Companions: Despite the flaws in their relationship, the three truly love each other and stick together.Starley: But, Chuck! You don't get to choose new sibs. We're your sibs! We may not always get along but we'll always be chicken family!

characters.name: Chuck
characters.description: Acquired Situational Narcissism: This happens almost all the time he gets something he wants. Affectionate Nickname: Starley calls him "Chuckles". All of the Other Reindeer: Everyone in the academy except his siblings and Hugo hate him. Annoying Younger Sibling: He takes advantage of his siblings' better traits and he sometimes picks on them. Attention Whore: He always wants the spotlight on him.

characters.name: Finley
characters.description: Affectionate Nickname: Starley and Chuck call him "Fin". Big Brother Bully: In "The Egg" he and Chuck laugh at Starley when she cries over her imaginary sister. In "Chicken Out" he and Starley play hide and seek with Chuck, at first just to keep him from stealing credit, but they decide to wait it out to take a break from him. Big Brother Instinct: He is there to protect his siblings, especially Starley. Butt-Monkey: Poor Finley can never get a break. Deadpan Snarker: Usually snarks at Chuck

characters.name: Starley
characters.description: All-Loving Hero: She's sweet and kind to everyone, even the likes of Niven, although she still flips out when she is being mean. Badass Adorable: She's utterly cute and kind but do NOT make her angry or you'll regret it. Beware the Nice Ones: Starley loves everyone and is the most popilar out of her siblings but making her angry will cause her to go into a "Rage Tantrum." Berserk Button: Telling her she can't fly and lying to her. Also, making fun of her. Big Sister Bully: In "The Egg" she tickles Chuck until he agrees to stowaway an egg.

characters.name: Glargg
characters.description: A Father to His Men: As much as he claims to dislike the chickens, he teams up with them a lot and sometimes even spends time with them, such as playing video games together. In "Players Gotta Play", he is he sacrifices his staffs to save them from being trapped in the Beige's fortress. The finale "Chicken Back Again" ends with all three of them giving him a hug. Even Evil Has Loved Ones: Glargg has an evil side to him that loves destruction, but he deeply cares for his pet Blibli and would protect her at any cost. Evil Teacher: He is the main teacher of SLURP but is not so secretly a wannabe tyrant. It's implied he uses the funds for world domination. Hypocrite: He is hurt his mom preferred his brother Brian over him, but he tends to be more proud of Starley than her brothers. I Have No Son!: He says his mother doesn't even consider him a part of the family.

characters.name: Niven
characters.description: Abusive Parents: "Ultimate Niven" reveals her mother is easily disappointed and embarrassed by her, even when she succeeds. Clingy Jealous Girl: She tries to kill Starley due to her being Glargg's "favorite". Kids Are Cruel: Niven bullies the chickens simply for being themselves. Hidden Heart of Gold: Deep down, she isn't all that bad. In "Personal Space Time" she realizes Chuck isn't that different from her and decides to befriend him (until the end of the episode). In "Ultimate Niven" she saves Starley's from floating away. I Just Want to Be Loved: Niven admits this in "Personal Space Time", due to fearing of losing her only friends since her family isn't as loving as Chuck's.

characters.name: Adele
characters.description: Absent-Minded Professor: For her intelligence she can be oblivious to her surroundings. She doesn't even know Chuck's name. All-Loving Hero: She is caring towards everyone at the academy, especially Finley, trying to help him rise to her level in grades. Always Someone Better: She has the best grades at the academy, even beating Finley, the genius of the trio. Aw, Look! They Really Do Love Each Other: There are moments of her liking Chuck back. In "Draw Anything" hearts appear when she looks at Chuck's egg and in "Bad Bad Bad" she smiles and waves at him when she hears his poem about her. The Klutz: Her flying isn't always coordinated and she stumbles a lot.

characters.name: Narcibelle
characters.description: Affectionate Nickname: "Narci" by Starley. Cute Bruiser: She is a pink girl who's physical strength rivals Starley's. Even the Loving Hero Has Hated Ones: She isn't a fan of how rotten Niven can be. She even made fun of Chuck in art class, implying she's not a fan of him either. Heterosexual Life-Partners: With Starley, they are always happy to see each other. Lovable Jock: She is the most athletic student at the academy and she is kind-hearted towards others.
